This field is populated by the user with the reference number of the trip. This number is a mandatory system requirement when publishing a template.
This field will display the title of the Minister who requested the trip.

A description of the reason for the government trip in question. The description should be succinct (one line if possible) and provide users with a general sense of the trip's purpose. Use of acronyms should be avoided, in English.
A description, in French, of the reason for the government trip in question. The description should be succinct (one line if possible) and provide users with a general sense of the trip's purpose. Use of acronyms should be avoided, in French
Date (Please format the date as YYYY-MM-DD)
The date the travel started.
Date (Please format the date as YYYY-MM-DD)
The date the travel ended (can be the same as travel start date).
Free text (Note, use full city/region, province/state and country name where possible. Separate multiple locations with semicolons.)
To include names of all places visited to conduct government business during the trip in question, in English. (separate multiple locations with semicolons)
Free text (Note, use full city/region, province/state and country name where possible. Separate multiple locations with semicolons.)
To include names of all places visited to conduct government business during the trip in question, in french. (separate multiple locations with semicolons)
The number of hours flown.
Free text (separated by commas)
Full list of flight passengers. (Comma seperated)
Free text (separate paragraphs with two blank lines)
This field will display any additional information, as deemed necessary, in English.
Free text (separate paragraphs with two blank lines)
This field will display any additional information, as deemed necessary, in French.
